findings.finding: FIXED: Hook 1 reminder text contradiction resolved. Phase 1 systemMessage now lists only ['be quick', 'just do it', 'trivial fix'] with an explicit parenthetical that bare 'minimal'/'trivial' are not accepted. All three hook block messages list the same three phrases. The contradiction between what Hook 1 advertised and what Hook 2 enforced is eliminated.

NOT_FIXED (intentional deferral — accepted): Fail-open crash warning goes only to stderr; Claude Code may not surface stderr from an exit-0 hook. If safe.py catches an exception on every invocation, enforcement is silently disabled. Deferral to tlmforge:doctor (Phase 6) is proportionate: no clean in-band channel exists at exit(0) without polluting the systemMessage stdout channel. For a single-user CLI tool with no adversarial threat model, the failure mode is reduced enforcement discipline, not data loss. Severity correctly calibrated at low.
